'''Asmall''' was an astronomical object in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. By [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], this important [[Factory world/Legends|manufacturing center]] was allied with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], who had established a defense net around it; the [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Tord Gamb]] stole information about the net, making him a fugitive wanted by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].

{{Planet-stub}}
